description: volume_search catch-all — matches ANY standardPlace (predicate '~' = empty-substring match) so a volume_search call not covered by a more specific fixture degrades gracefully to an empty result instead of erroring with fixture_not_found. MUST be ordered LAST among the volume-search fixtures in a test's mcp_fixtures so the specific place fixtures win first; this only fires when the skill widens to an unanticipated scope (e.g. country level). Mirrors the -any catch-all pattern the other tools already use.
